---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve. 
Example: "I find it difficult to X when Y..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which component does this affect?

- [ ] Command Center
- [ ] Recon Agent
- [ ] Exploit Agent
- [ ] Detect Agent
- [ ] Remediate Agent
- [ ] Monitor Agent
- [ ] Dashboard / TOC
- [ ] Commander Memory Engine
- [ ] Auth / Backend
- [ ] Docker / Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or additional context.
